name: Christmas Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions: Melt the chocolate. Beat the eggs until foamy. Add the sugar, spices, nuts, and flour. Then add the melted chocolate. Drop spoonfuls onto a well greased pan and bake at 300 degrees for 15 minutes. Alternatively, spread the batter about 1/2 inch thick in a jelly-roll pan. Bake until done.
